meaning: n.翎毛,轻的东西,羽毛vi.长羽毛vt.用羽毛装饰,射掉(飞禽)的羽毛
examples: I taped the base of the feather onto the velvet.
The feather must be removed with a straight, firm pull.
The chick will soon feather out.
Among the products featured is Allium, a spherical lampshade made from peacock feather-shaped slats.
But these soon gave way to color and feather embellishment and fantastically dizzying prints.
